title: Unidentified teeth implement
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=Braces|notoc=1}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
[[File:AmeeBraces-TPM.png|thumb|200px|[[Amee/Legends|Amee]] wearing the teeth implement.]]
A '''device''' was implemented by individuals on their [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]]. The device were known to be in use at least around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], during which the [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Amee/Legends|Amee]] from [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] was known to have worn.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The device first appeared in {{Film|I}} which was released on [[May 19]], [[1999]].<ref name="TPM" />

===Non-canon history===
In her final year in the middle school portion of the [[Jedi academy]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Gaiana]], one of the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] training at the school, returned from [[Spring/Legends|spring]] break wearing braces. Though [[Cronah]], a fellow student and school bully, teased her for it, none of the other students made an issue of it. [[Roan Novachez]], her boyfriend, comforted her by telling her that his brother, [[Davin Novachez]], had once had to wear braces.<ref name="bully">''[[Jedi Academy: The Phantom Bully]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*{{Film|I}} {{1st}}
